# Quaid

A personal memory system built with Rust, SQLite, and local vector embeddings.

## Compiled Truth

Quaid stores structured knowledge as pages with compiled truth and timeline sections. It uses FTS5 for keyword search and BGE-small-en-v1.5 for semantic embeddings. The system runs as a single static binary with zero network dependencies at runtime.
---
- **2024-01** | inception — Initial design and architecture started.
---
- **2024-03** | milestone — First working prototype with FTS5 search and hybrid retrieval.
